tree_topic: Arts & Entertainment > Online Media > Online Image Galleries
questions: Identify the digital art and design publication that released a curated list titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Using this publication as the primary source, locate their specific buying guide dedicated to mobile photography hardware. What is the exact full headline of the article concerning 'camera phones' that explicitly states in its title that the devices were 'tried and tested by a photographer'?

logic_chain: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer

Creative Bloq, a leading digital art and design publication, released the curated list "The 17 Best Photography Websites" [1]. Their mobile photography hardware buying guide features an article headlined "The Best Camera Phones: Tried and Tested by a Photographer" [2]. This comprehensive guide evaluates smartphones specifically selected and reviewed by professional photographers, providing readers with expert recommendations for mobile photography hardware purchases.

## References

[1] Creative Bloq. "The 17 Best Photography Websites." Creative Bloq.

[2] Creative Bloq. "The Best Camera Phones: Tried and Tested by a Photographer." Creative Bloq Mobile Photography Hardware Guide.
rounds.answer_b:
Digital Arts released a list titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Their mobile photography hardware buying guide includes an article with the exact headline: "Best camera phone 2024: the top smartphone cameras, tried and tested by a photographer" [1][2].

## References
[1] https://www.digitalartsonline.co.uk/news/photography/the-17-best-photography-websites
[2] https://www.digitalartsonline.co.uk/buying-guides/mobile-phones/best-camera-phone-tried-tested-photographer

Agent A correctly identifies Creative Bloq and the exact headline required. Agent B identifies 'Digital Arts' and a different headline ('Best camera phone 2024...'). Since Agent B fails to identify the correct entity defined by the Ground Truth, it fails the Deep Logic check. Agent A is accurate according to the provided checklist and formats the answer clearly.
